name: S-15 standards-remove --emit-audit records a jsonl line documenting the removal action
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: custom-spec\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id custom-spec --emit-audit audit.jsonl && [ -s audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"command":"standards-remove"' audit.jsonl && grep -q '"id":"custom-spec"' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
